overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from a video game showing three characters walking along a rocky Mediterranean-style coastline during golden hour. The group, consisting of a woman with a crossbow, a small child, and a companion, traverse a winding path beside crashing waves with a distant fortress visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shoreline with crashing waves

events.description: large wave crashes against coastal rocks sending white spray into the air
another large wave crashes against the rocks near the walking path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky coastal path with crossbow visible on back, accompanied by a child and companion

notable_agents.action: child walking closely beside the ego character, holding hands while navigating the uneven rocks
companion with curly hair and yellow vest walking alongside the group on the right side

entered.detail: uneven rocky terrain forming a narrow walking path along the shoreline
calm to moderately rough sea with visible wave movement
large historic stone fortress or castle visible across the water on a distant shore
steep rocky mountain face rising directly from the coastline
waves crashing against coastal rocks creating white water spray

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky Mediterranean-style coastline during golden hour. Three characters walk along a gravel path beside the ocean, with a distant stone fortress visible across the water. Large waves periodically crash against the rocks, sending spray into the air, while steep mountains rise on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal overlook with sun glare

events.description: camera turns toward the setting sun creating a bright lens flare over the water surface
group stops walking to stand and observe the distant fortress across the water

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal path before stopping to look out at the distant view, navigating around rock formations

notable_agents.action: child carefully walking over the uneven rocks, staying close to the ego character

segments.scene_description: The group continues along the coast as the path opens up to reveal more of the open sea. The camera turns slightly toward the water, capturing a bright lens flare from the setting sun. Around the 35-second mark, the characters pause to look out at the distant fortress, which has shifted to the left side of the frame as the group navigates the rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal path under pine tree canopy

events.description: path moves under overhead pine tree branches, changing lighting from bright sun to dappled shade

agents.ego_description: walking under the tree canopy while maintaining view of the coastline, leading the group forward along the shaded path

notable_agents.action: companion walking slightly ahead, looking out toward the water as they enter the tree cover

entered.detail: overhanging pine tree branches creating partial shade and dappled lighting over the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions as the coastal path moves under a canopy of pine trees, changing the lighting from bright golden hour to dappled shade. The group continues walking with the fortress now centered in the distant view across the water. The overhead branches create a natural tunnel effect over the rocky trail while the steep mountains remain visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rocky Mediterranean coastline that transitions from an open, sun-drenched shore into a shaded forest canopy. It begins with three characters traversing a gravel path beside the ocean, where large waves crash against the rocks beneath steep mountains and a distant stone fortress. As the path opens further toward the sea, the camera shifts toward the water to capture a bright lens flare from the setting sun while the group pauses to observe the fortress. The scene then transitions as the trail moves under a canopy of pine trees, shifting the lighting from bright gold to dappled shade. Finally, the overhead branches create a natural tunnel over the rocky trail, keeping the distant fortress centered in view across the water.
